/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT REPROT REGARDING CITY COLLEGE ENROLLMENT/CONTD PROC REBW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO07-11-11,/X: BAIL SET AT $5000/

/X:THE PEOPLE AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 2, HS 11377, A FELONY/FAWA/IRR/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:2/TWS/PRES:02-17-2011/REMA/VD:12-16-10 PTC AND 01-21-11 JURY TRIAL/X:INTHIS MATTER, THE COURT WILL DEFER SENTENCING ON COUNT 2 PENDING PROGRESS REPORTS REGARDING PROOF OF ENROLLMENT AND SUCCESSFUL PARTICIPATION IN CLASSES AT CITY COLLEGE FOR THE SPRING 2011 SEMESTER, IF HE FAILS TO COMPLETE THECLASSES OR PICKS UP A NEW CASE, THE MATTER WILL BE SENTENCED ON COUNT2 ASA FELONY, IF HE IS SUCCESSFUL, COUNT 2 WILL BE SENTENCED AS A MISDEMEANOR,THE COURT ASKS FOR A PROBATION REPORT SO THAT IF THE DEFENDANT IS NOT SUCCESSFUL, HE WILL BE SENTENCED ON 02-17-2011 IN DEPT 23/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/INVOFF:RICARDO GUERRERO/WIT SWORN:SFPD SERGEANT WILLIAM SCOTT; JIMMY LEW/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1- MANILLA EVIDENCE ENVELOPE; 1A- PLASTIC BAGGIE  CONTAINING CRYSTAL LIKE SUBSTANCE MARKED E2/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TOTHE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/HTA1:1/DEF:TO REMAINON O,R,/DOP/

/CAL:FURTHER PROC RE MOTION TO QUASH AND MOTION TO RETURN PROPERTY/X:RONNIE WAGNER IS NOT PRESENT FOR POLICE LEGAL,/X:THE COURT HAS CONDUCTED AN IN-CAMERA HEARING,  THE COURT ORDERS THE RELEASE OF GENERAL ORDERS AND INSTRUCTIONS REGARDING HOW OFFICERS SHOULD EXECUTE A SEARCH WARRANT,/STWPX/CONTD:TO SET & FOR MOTION TO RETURN PROPERTY/DOP/

/CAL:MOTION TO QUASH & MOTION TO RETURN PROPERTY/X:RONNIE WAGNER APPEARINGFOR POLICE LEGAL,/X:MOTION TO QUASH IS GRANTED WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/STWPX//CONTD:FURTHER PROCEEDINGS REGARDING MOTION TO QUASH AND MOTION TO RETURN PROPERTY/DOP/
